title: CVLTS
body:
# CVLTS

Experimental duo from **Lawrence, Kansas**. Their work uses an old
Clavinova, guitar pedals, and other effects, with improvisation, keyboards,
loops, and field recordings as primary materials. The European label
**AMDISCS** released a 100-copy limited-edition cassette of theirs titled
*LVST*; a later LP, *Realiser*, has a Discogs entry.

CVLTS is the **track 17 artist on Colin's REMIX10**:
*CVLTS-RADD PITT (clavinova_mic2 mix)*. The mix-name "clavinova_mic2"
matches CVLTS's signature Clavinova-and-pedals working method exactly,
which is what closes the geography question — the connection is real
but **not Denver**. Colin's archive folder
`_Documentation/Music/alphabets/Cvlts remix/RADDPITTcvltsremix.mp3` is the
local copy of that track.

**Remix direction:** the canonical reading per
[[series/remix|the REMIX series]] track-naming convention
(`[ORIGINAL ARTIST] – [ORIGINAL TRACK TITLE] (mix name)`) is that **Colin
remixed CVLTS's track "RADD PITT"** as the "clavinova_mic2 mix" — the same
shape as the other identified REMIX10 tracks (Modern Witch, Thundercade,
Constellations). The mix-name "clavinova_mic2" is unusual for Colin
(typically he picks playful coinages like *scary dipper* or *nine inch
witch*) — the more functional label may reflect that the source material
was already Clavinova-driven, so Colin tagged the mix by the mic / take
that produced it. The archive folder name `Cvlts remix` and file name
`RADDPITTcvltsremix.mp3` are consistent with the convention.

## Web-search status (2026-04-26, Session 14)

This entry resolves the long-standing CVLTS carry-forward (Sessions 12,
12b, 13). Prior public-web sweeps surfaced only a Bandcamp / Discogs
presence with no Denver provenance; today's targeted sweep on `CVLTS noise
Colorado experimental music` and `"CVLTS" Denver Rhinoceropolis noise`
returned The Pitch (Kansas City) coverage establishing the Lawrence
origin, plus the alphabets Bandcamp track page and AMDISCS / Soundohm
release pages. **CVLTS is not Denver.** Colin's connection is one of his
out-of-scene remix relationships — analogous to Stephen Steinbrink (SF /
Phoenix) on REMIX09.

## Sources

- The Pitch (KC): "Experimental Lawrence duo CVLTS find a European
  audience" — establishes the Lawrence, Kansas origin and the
  Clavinova / pedals / loops / field-recordings working method.
- alphabets Bandcamp: track page for *CVLTS-RADD PITT (clavinova_mic2
  mix)* — Colin's catalog hosts the remix.
- Discogs: *C V L T S – Realiser* — confirms the project's release
  history beyond the AMDISCS cassette.
- Soundohm: artist page for CVLTS — additional release stockists.
